title: Pack of 10 White Silver Seasons Greetings Family Christmas Crackers - 12" Metallic Festive Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations - Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: This set of ten family Christmas crackers features a charming silver house design on either a silver or white base, finished with elegant silver curling ribbon for a festive and modern look.
Each 12-inch cracker contains a classic Christmas selection including a colourful paper hat, a witty motto, a snap, and a surprise gift suitable for all ages.
Designed to add joy and entertainment to your holiday table, these crackers are perfect for family dinners, parties, and festive gatherings throughout the season.
All components, including the crackers and their packaging, are fully recyclable, making them a responsible and eco-friendly choice for environmentally conscious households.
The included gifts are plastic-free, allowing you to enjoy festive fun without compromising on sustainability—ideal for adding sparkle to your celebration with less waste.
description: Product Description Family Christmas Crackers Bring the whole family together with our fun and festive crackers. Each pack includes a mix of designs filled with paper hats, jokes and small prizes to keep everyone smiling. Perfect for family dinners, parties and holiday gatherings, they add sparkle, laughter and tradition to your table. Crackers for Unforgettable Festive Moments Sparkle with Silver Elegant silver snowflake crackers filled with fun prizes, hats, and mottos to delight family and friends at your table. Festive Red Wreaths Bright red crackers with classic wreath design, each with a prize, snap, hat, and motto to bring cheer to your celebrations. Tradition and Elegance at Your Christmas Table Golden Celebration Add a touch of luxury with gold and white crackers, complete with prizes, hats, mottos, and snaps for festive entertainment. Silver Winter Scene Stylish crackers featuring silver house designs, filled with festive prizes, paper hats, and jokes for holiday gatherings.
